  1. model

Uses of Class
model.User

Packages that use User
Package
Description
model
Domain objects for users, sessions, and the social-network graph.
service
Business services for authentication, users, friendships, and recommendations.
ui.javafx.controller
JavaFX controllers for the application's FXML views.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    SocialNetwork.getUser(String userId)
    Looks up a user by ID.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<User>
    SocialNetwork.getAllUsers()
    Returns a read-only view of all users.
    Set<User>
    SocialNetwork.getUsersByHometown(String hometown)
    Finds users whose hometown matches case-insensitively.
    Set<User>
    SocialNetwork.getUsersByWorkplace(String workplace)
    Finds users whose workplace matches case-insensitively.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    SocialNetwork.addUser(User user)
    Adds a user and updates the attribute indexes.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    User
    UserService.getCurrentUser()
    Returns the currently authenticated user.
    User

    Methods in service that return types with arguments of type User
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<User>
    FriendService.filterCurrentUserFriendsByHometown(String hometown)
    Filters the current user's friends by exact hometown.
    List<User>
    FriendService.filterCurrentUserFriendsByWorkplace(String workplace)
    Filters the current user's friends by exact workplace.
    Set<User>
    UserService.findUsersByHometown(String hometown)
    Finds users by hometown.
    Set<User>
    UserService.findUsersByWorkplace(String workplace)
    Finds users by workplace.
    Collection<User>
    UserService.getAllUsers()
    Returns all registered users.
    Set<User>
    FriendService.getCommonFriends(String otherUserId)
    Finds users who are friends with both the current user and another user.
    List<User>
    FriendService.getCurrentUserFriends()
    Returns the current user's friends.
    List<User>
    FriendService.getFriendsOfUser(String userId)
    Returns a user's friends, excluding the currently logged-in user.
    List<User>
    RecommendationService.recommendFriends()
    Returns recommended users ordered by descending recommendation score.
    Map<User,Integer>
    RecommendationService.recommendFriendsWithScores()
    Scores friend-of-friend candidates.
    Set<User>
    UserService.searchUsers(String searchType, String searchValue)
    Searches by user ID, name, workplace, or hometown.
